name: rocketsmith
description: Design, simulate, and build rockets with RocketSmith MCP tools.

author.name: Peter Pak, Jesse Barkley, Rumi Loghmani

interface.shortDescription: Rocket design and simulation tools for Codex.
interface.longDescription: Bundles the RocketSmith MCP server and skill so Codex can design, simulate, and prepare model rocket builds.
interface.developerName: Peter Pak, Jesse Barkley, Rumi Loghmani
defaultPrompt: Design me a stable rocket for a D12 motor.
Simulate my rocket and check its stability margin.
Generate build steps for the current RocketSmith design.
